$comment: Default Copilot Studio credit rates. 1 credit = $0.01 USD. These are placeholder defaults aligned with the public Copilot Studio Estimator (https://microsoft.github.io/copilot-studio-estimator/). Tweak these values to match the latest official rates for your scenario — both the webapp and the Power App read from this file, and the values must stay in sync.

agentTypes.label: Standard Copilot Studio agent
agentTypes.description: Custom-built agent authored in Copilot Studio (Generative or Classic runtime). Pay-per-message consumption.

agentTypes.label: Autonomous agent
agentTypes.description: Trigger-based agent that runs independently to perform tasks. Each autonomous task consumes a flat credit amount.

features.label: Classic answer / scripted topic
features.description: Authored topic, simple Q&A or dialog turn without generative AI.

features.label: Generative answer (public / web sources)
features.description: AI-generated answer grounded on public web content or non-enterprise knowledge.

features.label: Generative answer (enterprise data: Dataverse / SharePoint / Files)
features.description: AI-generated answer grounded on tenant-private knowledge sources.

features.label: Tenant graph grounding (Microsoft Graph)
features.description: Answer grounded with Microsoft Graph data (people, calendar, email).

features.label: Action / connector / Power Automate flow
features.description: Each action invocation (Power Automate flow, custom connector, Dataverse op).

features.label: Autonomous task execution
features.description: Flat credit consumption per autonomous task / trigger run.

features.label: Action invoked inside autonomous run
features.description: Each downstream action triggered during an autonomous task.
